answers: Learn sketching: start with basic shapes (circles, squares, triangles), then combine them to draw complex objects.
Beginner tips: draw daily (even 10 minutes), use references, focus on proportions, and don't erase — learn from mistakes.
Essential supplies: HB pencil, sketchbook, eraser, and ruler. That's all you need to start. Quality supplies come later.
Anka shekha: daily practice koro, basic shape theke shuru koro, reference dekhe anko, ar mistakes theke shikho.
